notes:
Bluetooth controls + sleep-proof listening.

FIXED: Your headset, car and lock screen now actually control narration — play/pause and skip a chapter forward/back. And books keep playing when the screen goes off or you leave the app. Two faults: the media session never reported that it was playing, and nothing ever held audio focus — so Android had no reason to send us the buttons or protect the process.

Also in 2.23: Royal Road (LitRPG), Wattpad (romance), Gutenberg classics, and Stories searches all of them at once. Bluetooth/car controls, on-device "story so far" recaps, rebuilt player. New droplet icon and a splash where the drop rains in. Every sheet is real frosted glass.

Full changelog on the releases page.
